text.text:
*347 brands total* (+2 today)
99.4% have complete profiles (description + image) — 345/347

*:x: Broken Links (5)*

• `1002` — <https://www.qvtu.edu.cn/sam/info/1002/2337.htm|qvtu.edu.cn> — points to a Chinese vocational university page, not a brand website
• `ENABLE` — threads.com/@meta.ai post — URL points to Meta's AI chatbot account, not the brand
• `Nebula Scent 雲香設計` — threads.com/@meta.ai post — same; brand's actual site is nebulascent.com / @nebula_scent_design
• `Mr.Casa 傢燈先生` — <https://spstaszic.pl/products/baea6140126201|spstaszic.pl> — Polish primary school website
• `JSM Beauty` — <https://www.reddit.com/r/goodyearwelt/comments/7a7rhk/|reddit.com/r/goodyearwelt> — unrelated Reddit thread about shoe economics

*:warning: Suspicious — Third-party (73+)*

• *71 Threads.com URLs* — brands linking to social posts rather than own domain; 2 of these already classified as Broken above (the @meta.ai ones)
• *2 Line.me URLs* — Southgate 南登機口, 淡然有味 Danran Tea
• *2 taiwan-brands.vercel.app* — 7th Island, 三十革皮藝 both link to the MIT directory platform, not their own sites
• Additional marketplace/aggregator links: brands pointing to Yahoo Shopping, Coupang, Biggo, Books.com.tw, Pixnet, Dcard, Reddit, news sites, etc.

_Full third-party URL inventory available in DEV-1015._

*DB Health*

*Top tables:* `brands` (11 MB), `brand_ai_results` (9.2 MB), `storage.objects` (7.9 MB), `brand_search_results` (7.1 MB), `brand_images` (4 MB)

*Connections:* 1 active / 20 idle / 0 idle-in-txn (23 total) — healthy

*Dead tuples — VACUUM needed on 7 tables:*
`brand_owners` 1100% · `brand_saves` 800% · `newsletter_subscribers` 500% · `brand_submissions` 550% · `claim_requests` 100% · `profiles` 143% · `app_secrets` 50%
_Also: 4 empty tables with orphaned dead rows (pending_brand_edits 38, brand_reports 44, moderation_flags 40, owner_email_preferences 29)_
_Approaching threshold: `brand_faq` 18.6%, `brand_images` 14.2%, `brand_field_state` 11.6%_

*Slow queries:* Top 5 are VACUUM ANALYZE calls (administrative). Extension metadata scan: 86 calls at mean 535ms — worth monitoring.
